name: PuraEstate - Slack Daily Listings by Province

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  province,
  property_type,
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  ROUND(AVG(price)::numeric, 0) AS avg_price,
  MIN(price) AS min_price,
  MAX(price) AS max_price,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN bedrooms >= 3 THEN 1 END) AS family_homes
FROM properties
WHERE status = 'active'
AND price > 0
AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'
GROUP BY province, property_type
ORDER BY province, count DESC;

SELECT 
  listing_id,
  title,
  price,
  bedrooms,
  bathrooms,
  property_type,
  suburb,
  city,
  province,
  url
FROM properties
WHERE status = 'active'
AND price > 0
AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
